李轻君穿越大风皇朝十八载，面临生死危机之时，系统终于加载完毕！
【奖励宿主无上大帝巅峰修为！】
【奖励宿主天帝道剑！】
【奖励宿主无上仙体！】
【奖励宿主无敌军团！】
什么？只要扩建皇朝就奖励无上修为！？
什么？只要收追随者就能召唤无敌军团？
什么？只要威压九天十地就能获得大道仙物？
……
座下血狱军团，血主楚信，上古魔帝残魂转世，背负盛世气运，残酷冷漠，好筑京观！
座下武神军团，武主林炎，背负盛世气运，登临武道绝巅，身无拘，道无极！
座下魔天军团，魔主王凌，背负万古前的气运，魔焰滔天，心狠手辣！
座下凌仙军团，玄主燕惊仙，背负上古气运，狂傲无边，藐视群仙！
座下天荒军团，荒主石皓，背负盛世气运，登临道之绝巅，镇压诸仙！
……
当万域中再无一人可并肩，当万域所有势力削尖了脑袋，只为后辈能够加入仙朝时。
李轻君望着那满天仙魔，随着他帝剑微斜，无数无敌军团纷纷远征仙魔，以仙魔之血铸这无上仙朝！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/8041386263882b5bc1e7ed97153aa647","author":"君轻语","author_id":"","book_id":"7376506567018941465","book_name":"开局无上大帝，横推一切敌","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#483028","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.5万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7376506760422507033","read_count":"24133","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1334520"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.4","serial_count":"648","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,系统,穿越,架空,开局,东方玄幻","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/ef84060041bbd68c5dbe20e024c249a7~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779394445&x-signature=Y%2BqVyE4h7hHuuClCRS9BxyxtrgU%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3825894705078103","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"64"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032304140501A97C766452731AA5F2"}"},"relat
